channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New Samsung One UI 7 leaks show how the free update will change your Galaxy phone
item.description: We're still waiting for the public beta, but plenty of info is already appearing about the One UI 7 upgrade.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Stretching comms to the limit in the wake of a natural disaster
item.description: The effects of a brutal storm that hit the eastern Spanish peninsula in late October were felt beyond the affected areas. Videos shared on social media and calls to television and radio programs showed the magnitude of the rain and flooding in Valencia, Albacete, and other towns in the area.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Australian Parliament bans social media for under-16s with world-first law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Uber branches out into AI data labeling
item.description: Uber no longer offers just rides and deliveries: It’s created a new division hiring out gig workers to help enterprises with some of their AI model development work.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Python to C: What’s new in Cython 3.1
item.description: Cython is the most convenient way to bridge C and Python languages and tools in Python programs. Developers use it to write C extensions or wrap C libraries for use in Python. Now, a major new release is on the way.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Shining a light on shadow AI: Three ways to keep your enterprise safe
item.description: To mitigate shadow AI, leaders should build cross-functional teams to leverage interdisciplinary expertise and foster organizational awareness. The post Shining a light on shadow AI: Three ways to keep your enterprise safe first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Cisco, NTT Data partner to simplify private 5G connectivity
item.description: Cisco and NTT Data are extending their partnership to offer customers more streamlined options for deploying private 5G services for enterprise connectivity. The partnership ties Cisco’s networking technologies to NTT Data’s Transatel network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Anthropic introduces the Model Context Protocol
item.description: Anthropic today released a new open source protocol to let all AI systems, not just its own, connect with data sources via a standard interface.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Instagram's Threads gets 35 million new users this month
item.description: Nearly 35 million new users have flocked to Instagram's Threads this month as the Meta platform seeks to capture users leaving X and keep an edge over emerging platform Bluesky.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce
item.description: Learn how agencies are innovating their payroll services to meet evolving needs The post Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Build generative AI pipelines without the infrastructure headache
item.description: While creating a basic ChatGPT prototype might take a weekend, developing production-ready generative AI systems that securely handle enterprise data presents significantly greater engineering challenges.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: AWS and Anthropic ink deal to accelerate model development, enhance AI chips
item.description: The announcement that Amazon Web Services (AWS) will be Anthropic’s primary training partner confirms rumors of an even tighter partnership between the two companies. They announced Friday that Anthropic will use AWS Trainium processors to train and deploy its Claude family of models.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Risk and Compliance Exchange 2024: DoD’ Stacy Bostjanick, DCMA’s Jennifer Henderson on finding ‘any means possible’ to help small biz with CMMC
item.description: As the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification program inches closer to reality, DoD prepares defense industrial base for compliance requirements.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
